11#ifndef LLVM_LIB_TARGET_R600_AMDGPU_H
12#define LLVM_LIB_TARGET_R600_AMDGPU_H

14#include "llvm/Support/TargetRegistry.h"
15#include "llvm/Target/TargetMachine.h"
16
17namespace llvm {
18
19class AMDGPUInstrPrinter;
20class AMDGPUSubtarget;
21class AMDGPUTargetMachine;
22class FunctionPass;
23class MCAsmInfo;
24class raw_ostream;
25class Target;
26class TargetMachine;
27
28// R600 Passes
29FunctionPass *createR600VectorRegMerger(TargetMachine &tm);
30FunctionPass *createR600TextureIntrinsicsReplacer();
31FunctionPass *createR600ExpandSpecialInstrsPass(TargetMachine &tm);
32FunctionPass *createR600EmitClauseMarkers();
33FunctionPass *createR600ClauseMergePass(TargetMachine &tm);
34FunctionPass *createR600Packetizer(TargetMachine &tm);
35FunctionPass *createR600ControlFlowFinalizer(TargetMachine &tm);
36FunctionPass *createAMDGPUCFGStructurizerPass();
37
38// SI Passes
39FunctionPass *createSITypeRewriter();
40FunctionPass *createSIAnnotateControlFlowPass();
41FunctionPass *createSIFoldOperandsPass();
42FunctionPass *createSILowerI1CopiesPass();
43FunctionPass *createSIShrinkInstructionsPass();
44FunctionPass *createSILoadStoreOptimizerPass(TargetMachine &tm);
45FunctionPass *createSILowerControlFlowPass(TargetMachine &tm);
46FunctionPass *createSIFixControlFlowLiveIntervalsPass();
47FunctionPass *createSIFixSGPRCopiesPass(TargetMachine &tm);
48FunctionPass *createSIFixSGPRLiveRangesPass();
49FunctionPass *createSICodeEmitterPass(formatted_raw_ostream &OS);
50FunctionPass *createSIInsertWaits(TargetMachine &tm);
51FunctionPass *createSIPrepareScratchRegs();
52
53void initializeSIFoldOperandsPass(PassRegistry &);
54extern char &SIFoldOperandsID;
55
56void initializeSILowerI1CopiesPass(PassRegistry &);
57extern char &SILowerI1CopiesID;
58
59void initializeSILoadStoreOptimizerPass(PassRegistry &);
60extern char &SILoadStoreOptimizerID;
61
62// Passes common to R600 and SI
63FunctionPass *createAMDGPUPromoteAlloca(const AMDGPUSubtarget &ST);
64Pass *createAMDGPUStructurizeCFGPass();
65FunctionPass *createAMDGPUISelDag(TargetMachine &tm);
66ModulePass *createAMDGPUAlwaysInlinePass();
67
68/// \brief Creates an AMDGPU-specific Target Transformation Info pass.
69ImmutablePass *
70createAMDGPUTargetTransformInfoPass(const AMDGPUTargetMachine *TM);
71
72void initializeSIFixControlFlowLiveIntervalsPass(PassRegistry&);
73extern char &SIFixControlFlowLiveIntervalsID;
74
75void initializeSIFixSGPRLiveRangesPass(PassRegistry&);
76extern char &SIFixSGPRLiveRangesID;
77
78
79extern Target TheAMDGPUTarget;
80extern Target TheGCNTarget;
81
82namespace AMDGPU {
83enum TargetIndex {
84 TI_CONSTDATA_START,
85 TI_SCRATCH_RSRC_DWORD0,
86 TI_SCRATCH_RSRC_DWORD1,
87 TI_SCRATCH_RSRC_DWORD2,
88 TI_SCRATCH_RSRC_DWORD3
89};
90}
91
92#define END_OF_TEXT_LABEL_NAME "EndOfTextLabel"
93
94} // End namespace llvm
95
96namespace ShaderType {
97 enum Type {
98 PIXEL = 0,
99 VERTEX = 1,
100 GEOMETRY = 2,
101 COMPUTE = 3
102 };
103}
104
105/// OpenCL uses address spaces to differentiate between
106/// various memory regions on the hardware. On the CPU
107/// all of the address spaces point to the same memory,
108/// however on the GPU, each address space points to
109/// a separate piece of memory that is unique from other
110/// memory locations.
111namespace AMDGPUAS {
112enum AddressSpaces {
113 PRIVATE_ADDRESS = 0, ///< Address space for private memory.
114 GLOBAL_ADDRESS = 1, ///< Address space for global memory (RAT0, VTX0).
115 CONSTANT_ADDRESS = 2, ///< Address space for constant memory
116 LOCAL_ADDRESS = 3, ///< Address space for local memory.
117 FLAT_ADDRESS = 4, ///< Address space for flat memory.
118 REGION_ADDRESS = 5, ///< Address space for region memory.
119 PARAM_D_ADDRESS = 6, ///< Address space for direct addressible parameter memory (CONST0)
120 PARAM_I_ADDRESS = 7, ///< Address space for indirect addressible parameter memory (VTX1)
121
122 // Do not re-order the CONSTANT_BUFFER_* enums. Several places depend on this
123 // order to be able to dynamically index a constant buffer, for example:
124 //
125 // ConstantBufferAS = CONSTANT_BUFFER_0 + CBIdx
126
127 CONSTANT_BUFFER_0 = 8,
128 CONSTANT_BUFFER_1 = 9,
129 CONSTANT_BUFFER_2 = 10,
130 CONSTANT_BUFFER_3 = 11,
131 CONSTANT_BUFFER_4 = 12,
132 CONSTANT_BUFFER_5 = 13,
133 CONSTANT_BUFFER_6 = 14,
134 CONSTANT_BUFFER_7 = 15,
135 CONSTANT_BUFFER_8 = 16,
136 CONSTANT_BUFFER_9 = 17,
137 CONSTANT_BUFFER_10 = 18,
138 CONSTANT_BUFFER_11 = 19,
139 CONSTANT_BUFFER_12 = 20,
140 CONSTANT_BUFFER_13 = 21,
141 CONSTANT_BUFFER_14 = 22,
142 CONSTANT_BUFFER_15 = 23,
143 ADDRESS_NONE = 24, ///< Address space for unknown memory.
144 LAST_ADDRESS = ADDRESS_NONE
145};
146
147} // namespace AMDGPUAS
148
149#endif
